title: OKAN TOMER
content:
OKAN TOMER

Homepage

MENU

OKAN TOMER started to organize language courses to transfer academic knowledge and experience of Istanbul Okan University Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences, Department of Translation Studies and Foreign Language Coordinator  to wider areas of society. The courses are offered in general and special purpose English, Russian, Chinese, Arabic, German and Turkish for Foreigners and are carried out within a specific and continuous academic program. OKAN TOMER Head Office, located in Kadıköy Campus of our university, also opens language classes in Tuzla unit. The course content determined in line with the principles of the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEF) aims to reach especially adults and students in the school age with special discounts, with a large number of local and foreign lecturers.
